summary: Completed testing of Lancio AI-driven phase. Backend: 9/9 tests passed - GET /api/partner-journey/lancio/2 returns complete plan_data with calendario_30g (30 items), contenuti_pronti (reel/carousel/post), piano_ads, webinar, promozione_webinar. plan_generated=true and plan_approved=true. POST generate-plan returns 422 for empty body. POST approve-plan works. Frontend: All UI elements verified - Hero 'Attiviamo il tuo lancio' visible, all 5 tabs (Calendario/Contenuti/Ads/Webinar/Promozione) visible, week filters (Settimana 1-4) visible, calendar day cards visible, sub-tabs for Contenuti (Reel/Carousel/Post) visible, Ads sub-tabs (Panoramica/Creatività/Copy) visible, Webinar shows titolo/promessa/scaletta, Promozione shows social/ads/email, CompletedBanner visible when plan_approved=true, admin-panoramic-lancio visible in admin view.
critical_code_review_comments: LancioPage.jsx correctly implements AI-driven pattern with tabs for calendario, contenuti, ads, webinar, promozione
Backend endpoint GET /api/partner-journey/lancio/{partner_id} returns complete plan_data structure
Backend endpoint POST /api/partner-journey/lancio/approve-plan correctly updates plan_approved status
Frontend correctly shows CompletedBanner when plan_approved=true
Admin view shows admin-panoramic-lancio with all tabs and content
test_credentials: Admin: claudio.bertogliatti@gmail.com / Evoluzione74. Partner demo: Arianna Aceto (ID 2) - piano lancio GIÀ GENERATO e APPROVATO nel DB
